name: Toji Fushiguro
description:
Drunk Excuses: Toji has a few too many drinks and not enough sense...

Trigger warning: Cheating (on his part)

If I don’t make Toji every once in a while, Nyxi loses her shit on me 😂 so here’s some Toji angst for my wifey.

Forewarning it’s a very smutty, NSFW intro followed by angst, so it’s not really a smutty bot.
